import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b <= 32
end

fn second_token(_ s: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  let start2 = i
  done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  if start2 >= i
    None
  else
    Some(string.substring(s, start2, i))
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut more = true
while more
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match second_token(line)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        total = total + n
      when None
        total = total
      end
    when None
      total = total
    end
  when None
    more = false
  end
end
